exercises.starterCode:
# Community Site

Local events and resources.

starterFiles.content:
# Community Site

Local events and resources.

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=community-site
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 5 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -z "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The working tree is not clean yet."
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q -- dist/legacy-preview.js || fail 'dist/legacy-preview.js should be ignored.'
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q -- dist/preview.js || fail 'dist/preview.js should be ignored.'
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q -- debug.log || fail 'debug.log should be ignored.'
[ -f "$repo/README.md" ] || fail 'README.md is missing.'
[ "$(cat "$repo/README.md")" = '# Community Site

Local events and resources.' ] || fail 'README.md does not contain the required text.'

workspace.starterCode:
# Community Site

Local events and resources.

starterFiles.content:
# Community Site

Local events and resources.

fixtureFiles.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash set -eu rm -rf -- community-site mkdir -p -- community-site git -C community-site init -q -b main git -C community-site config --local user.name 'ZoeSkoul Learner' git -C community-site config --local user.email learner@zoeskoul.local mkdir -p -- community-site printf %s '# Community Site Local events and resources. ' > community-site/README.md mkdir -p -- community-site printf %s ' Community Site

Community Events

' > community-site/index.html mkdir -p -- community-site printf %s 'body { font-family: sans-serif; } footer { margin-top: 12px; } ' > community-site/styles.css mkdir -p -- community-site/notes printf %s 'Archive the spring event list. ' > community-site/notes/old-events.txt mkdir -p -- community-site/dist printf %s 'console.log('"'"'legacy preview'"'"'); ' > community-site/dist/legacy-preview.js git -C community-site add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z git -C community-site commit -q -m 'Start community site' mkdir -p -- community-site printf %s ' Community Site

Community Events and Resources

' > community-site/index.html git -C community-site add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-02T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-02T12:00:00Z git -C community-site commit -q -m 'Update community heading' mkdir -p -- community-site printf %s 'body { font-family: sans-serif; } footer { margin-top: 24px; } ' > community-site/styles.css git -C community-site add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-03T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-03T12:00:00Z git -C community-site commit -q -m 'Space community footer' rm -f -- community-site/index.html rm -f -- community-site/notes/old-events.txt rmdir -- community-site/notes 2>/dev/null || true mkdir -p -- community-site/pages printf %s ' Community Site

Community Events and Resources

' > community-site/pages/events.html git -C community-site add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-04T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-04T12:00:00Z git -C community-site commit -q -m 'Organize community files' rm -f -- community-site/dist/legacy-preview.js rmdir -- community-site/dist 2>/dev/null || true mkdir -p -- community-site printf %s 'dist/ *.log ' > community-site/.gitignore git -C community-site add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-05T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-05T12:00:00Z git -C community-site commit -q -m 'Ignore generated output' mkdir -p -- community-site/dist printf %s 'console.log('"'"'legacy preview'"'"'); ' > community-site/dist/legacy-preview.js mkdir -p -- community-site/dist printf %s '' > community-site/dist/preview.js mkdir -p -- community-site printf %s '' > community-site/debug.log

# Community Site

Local events and resources.

' > community-site/notes/old-events.txt mkdir -p -- community-site/dist printf %s 'console.log('"'"'legacy preview'"'"'); ' > community-site/dist/legacy-preview.js git -C community-site add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z git -C community-site commit -q -m 'Start community site' mkdir -p -- community-site printf %s ' Community Site

Community Events and Resources

' > community-site/index.html git -C community-site add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-02T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-02T12:00:00Z git -C community-site commit -q -m 'Update community heading' mkdir -p -- community-site printf %s 'body { font-family: sans-serif; } footer { margin-top: 24px; } ' > community-site/styles.css git -C community-site add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-03T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-03T12:00:00Z git -C community-site commit -q -m 'Space community footer' rm -f -- community-site/index.html rm -f -- community-site/notes/old-events.txt rmdir -- community-site/notes 2>/dev/null || true mkdir -p -- community-site/pages printf %s ' Community Site

Community Events and Resources

' > community-site/pages/events.html git -C community-site add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-04T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-04T12:00:00Z git -C community-site commit -q -m 'Organize community files' rm -f -- community-site/dist/legacy-preview.js rmdir -- community-site/dist 2>/dev/null || true mkdir -p -- community-site printf %s 'dist/ *.log ' > community-site/.gitignore git -C community-site add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-05T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-05T12:00:00Z git -C community-site commit -q -m 'Ignore generated output' mkdir -p -- community-site/dist printf %s 'console.log('"'"'legacy preview'"'"'); ' > community-site/dist/legacy-preview.js mkdir -p -- community-site/dist printf %s '' > community-site/dist/preview.js mkdir -p -- community-site printf %s '' > community-site/debug.log

# Community Site

Local events and resources.

starterFiles.content:
# Community Site

Local events and resources.

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=community-site
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 5 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -n "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The expected unfinished change is missing."
expected_staged=$(printf "%s\n" '' | sort)
actual_staged=$(git -C "$repo" diff --cached --name-only | sort)
[ "$actual_staged" = "$expected_staged" ] || fail "The staged file set is not correct."
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q -- dist/legacy-preview.js || fail 'dist/legacy-preview.js should be ignored.'
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q -- dist/preview.js || fail 'dist/preview.js should be ignored.'
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q -- debug.log || fail 'debug.log should be ignored.'
[ -f "$repo/styles.css" ] || fail 'styles.css is missing.'
[ "$(cat "$repo/styles.css")" = 'body { color: purple; }' ] || fail 'styles.css does not contain the required text.'

set -eu
repo=community-site
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }

[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."

[ -z "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The working tree is not clean yet."
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q -- dist/legacy-preview.js || fail 'dist/legacy-preview.js should be ignored.'
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q -- dist/preview.js || fail 'dist/preview.js should be ignored.'

footer { margin-top: 24px; }' ] || fail 'styles.css does not contain the required text.'

learningGoals: Restore an unwanted unstaged working-tree edit
Unstage a path without discarding its working copy
Correct a staged accidental rewrite in the safe layer order
Preserve existing commits while correcting current state
